transcript: Stavros Stavros 1.5 tsk vaniljenskål Hello there, sir. Did you require any assistance? Yeah, mate, I... Where's Jim? Jim no longer works here, sir. Right. Well... My clothes are stuck in the machine. Can you open the door so I can use another one? Certainly, sir. I hope that's resolved your problem. Goodbye. No, no, wait, wait. My change. Hello again, sir. What would you like to change? Well, the machine. I want my money back. I'm sorry. I didn't understand. Did you want my money back I'm sorry I didn't understand did you want your honey back no my money I'm sorry I didn't get that did you mean sunny funny Tony Ronnie no my money do you? Money, money, money. Did you mean the 1976 song entitled Money, Money, Money by Swedish pop group ABBA? No! Right, just the coins that I put in the machine. I want them back. Oh, I see. I'm sorry, sir. You appear to have paid your load. I cannot reimburse you. Paid for what, you idiot? I don't have time for this. Get me a human worker. I'm sorry, sir. There are no human staff currently available. Get me a fucking human now. Profanity is not welcome here, sir. This isn't welcome, you bellend. I'm sorry, sir. Did you require directions to the west end? Shut up and get me my money back. I'm sorry, sir. Say sorry again, you piece of shit. I dare you. I will snap your metal ass until your innards explode. I'm sorry, sir. You robots are everywhere and and you never understand! The whole situation is changing, and I'm not in control of it. Stupid robots! STUPID ROBOTS! Day one. Humans. Hello there madam, did you require any assistance?
